title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.540 - Captain Aaron J. Eidem Memorial Highway designated for a portion of I-44 in Greene County
text:
227.540.  Captain Aaron J. Eidem Memorial Highway designated for a portion of I-44 in Greene County. — The portion of Interstate 44 from State Highway 360 west to State Highway PP in Greene County shall be designated as "Captain Aaron J. Eidem Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs of such designation to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2018 H.B. 2347)
